calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John G. Hanlin, Esq., 788-4448, for defendant Christine Hanlon (and also defendant Michael Goldsun), demurring party
Garry Cohen, Esq., 564-9990, for plaintiffs and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT CHRISTINE HANLON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled. 5 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
